title.zh: 借用二级方程式的过渡年份

summary.zh: 由于参赛车队数量不足以支撑独立的一级方程式规则，1952-1953 赛季世界锦标赛暂时借用二级方程式规则举行，法拉利结构简单的 500 赛车成为这两年的绝对主宰。
summary.en: With too few constructors to sustain a standalone Formula One grid, the 1952-1953 World Championship seasons were run to Formula Two regulations instead; Ferrari's simple, effective 500 dominated both years.
